summary: 93 flagged links, 0 P0. 3 REAL_BROKEN from 'command' vs 'commands' typo (5 occurrences across 4 files), 2 TEMPLATE_EXAMPLE <spec-folder> placeholders (intentional), 10 REAL_BROKEN migration-manifest.json references (file missing from target path; exists only in deep scratch), and 78 TARGET_DELETED/WRONG_SLUG_TARGET_EXISTS from the #133 de-numbering migration — most numbered filenames have no de-numbered equivalent on disk (files were removed, not just renamed). Only 3 links have de-numbered matches with slightly different names. Systemic pattern: the de-numbering migrated filenames but the playbook index table still references the pre-migration numbered paths; ~84% (78/93) are migration artifacts.
